$schema_note: Crop offsets map original 1440×900 Play Mode screen space to exported SVG top-left. Formula: localX = screenX - crop.x; localY = screenY - crop.y. play_flap_coords in components/flap-coords.js are in screen space.

v33.coordinateSpace: decorate-local (origin = chatterbox top-left; matches decorate_flap_coords / PRD §15)
v33.note: Exported from Decorate instance 933:22940. Raw SVG included parent Screen background (#F5F5F5 rect + huge white paths) — those were stripped; kept only the Chatterbox-undecorated group + defs. Prior Sandbox isolate 573:7311 (291×292) was wrong size/space.
